2605.07955.title: TimeLesSeg: Unified Contrast-Agnostic Cross-Sectional and Longitudinal MS Lesion Segmentation via a Stochastic Generative Model
2605.07955.paper_summary: Multiple sclerosis (MS) expresses substantial clinical and radiological heterogeneity, which poses significant challenges for automatic lesion segmentation. The current deep learning-based SOTA is highly susceptible to changes in both distribution, e.g., changes in scanner; as well as the structure of inputs, evident in the current divide between cross-sectional and longitudinal approaches. We introduce TimeLesSeg, a unified contrast-agnostic framework designed to segment MS lesions regardless of the presence of a temporal dimension in its inputs, with a single convolutional neural network. Our approach models pathological priors through lesion masks, which are processed together with the current scan. Cross-sectional processing is enabled by exposing the model to training cases where no prior information is available, which are modeled with an empty mask, allowing it to operate seamlessly in both scenarios. To overcome the scarcity and inconsistency of longitudinal datasets, we propose a novel generative pipeline in which patterns of lesion evolution are simulated by stochastically deforming each individual lesion with morphological operations, producing realistic prior timepoints. In parallel, we achieve contrast agnosticism through Gaussian mixture model-based domain randomization, enabling the network to experience a wide spectrum of intensity profiles. Results on three publicly available and two in-house datasets show that TimeLesSeg outperforms the contrast-agnostic state of the art on single-modality inputs across overlap- and distance-based metrics. In longitudinal processing, our method outperforms SAMSEG, and captures lesion load dynamics more accurately than both the former and LST-AI. All source code related to the development of TimeLesSeg is available at https://github.com/NeuroADaS-Lab/TimeLesSeg.
2605.07955.paper_summary_zh: 多發性硬化症（MS）表現出顯著的臨床和放射學異質性，這對自動病變分割提出了重大挑戰。當前基於深度學習的最先進技術對於分佈的變化（例如，掃描儀的變化）以及輸入結構的變化高度敏感，這在當前橫斷面和縱向方法之間的區分中顯而易見。我們引入了TimeLesSeg，一個統一的無關對比框架，旨在使用單一卷積神經網絡分割MS病變，無論其輸入中是否存在時間維度。我們的方法通過病變掩模建模病理先驗，這些掩模與當前掃描一起處理。通過將模型暴露於沒有先前信息的訓練案例來實現橫斷面處理，這些案例用空掩模建模，使其能夠在兩種情境中無縫運作。為了克服縱向數據集的稀缺性和不一致性，我們提出了一個新穎的生成管道，其中通過隨機變形每個個別病變並進行形態學操作來模擬病變演變的模式，產生現實的先前時間點。同時，我們通過基於高斯混合模型的領域隨機化實現了對比無關性，使網絡能夠體驗到廣泛的強度配置文件。在三個公開可用和兩個內部數據集上的結果顯示，TimeLesSeg在基於重疊和距離的指標上超越了單模態輸入的對比無關最先進技術。在縱向處理中，我們的方法超越了SAMSEG，並比前者和LST-AI更準確地捕捉病變負荷動態。與TimeLesSeg開發相關的所有源代碼可在 https://github.com/NeuroADaS-Lab/TimeLesSeg 獲得。
2605.07955.author: Vicent Caselles-Ballester et.al.
2605.07955.authors: Vicent Caselles-Ballester, Eloy Martínez-Heras, Giuseppe Pontillo, Zoe Mendelsohn, Elena M. Marrón, Juan Luis García Fernández, Laia Subirats, Jon Stutters, Jeremy Chataway, Frederik Barkhof, Sara Llufriu, Ferran Prados
